title: Systems and methods for vehicle management
abstract: Systems and methods for vehicle management. The method comprising: obtaining first timestamp information of a ultra-wideband (UWB) pulse signal associated with a vehicle (1410); obtaining second timestamp information associated with at least one communication node configured to transmit or receive UWB pulse signals (1420); determining positioning information of the vehicle based on the first timestamp information and the second timestamp information (1430).
